item.title: Wednesday Wholesome Dump That Will Nurture Your Soul
item.description:
1. You got this!
2. How many of you want a room like that?
3. Adorable noises
4. Nice internet people strike again
5. Your order is her... ow...
6. His reaction is so adorable
7
8. Never will get tired of seeing people dancing with their dogs
9. Neat science trick
10
11. Man finds out he will be a grandfather
12
13
14. This dog is a baller
15. Thanks for scrolling all the way trough! Hope this dump made you happy! Finally I would like to share with you a little passion project of mine. Me and my brother are making a game that is inspired by "The Stanley Parable" and the narrator definitely has a touch of GladOS to him. The game was part of Next Fest 2024 and it would меан the world to us if you wishlisted: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: I’m not bloody crying YOU are
item.dc:creator: thebansheee

item.title: I keep seeing this horrible game in the Imgur ads
item.description: There's enough real misery in the world that to profit from it in this way seems utterly contemptible. Whoever came up with this should spend a year in poverty themselves. Edit: Not "most viral" but I just wanted to add that I have learned a lot from the comments here; a) that I'm not the only one who hates these ads, and b) I learned of the existence of "whales." What a crazy world we live in. Edit 2: Ouch, MV was totally unexpected for this one. I was mostly just "reee"ing into the void, but I seem to have struck a nerve. Thanks to all who have educated me on the economics and logistics of these deceptive ads and absurd games. PS: For those commenting about uBlock and "there are ads?" etc, I use adblockers but do most of my Imguring on mobile, where I have found no such niceties.
item.dc:creator: AyatollahBahloni

2
3

5

item.dc:creator: GorgeousGeorgieous

item.title: Hugh Jackman eating a brazilian 'coxinha' for the first time.
item.description:
Coxinhas are roughly equivalent to croquettes, but smoother and made with chicken, sometimes with cheese.
Needless to say, Brazilians loved his reaction. But brazilians loved him already since...
He met up and paid a homage to Isaac Bardavid, who basically voiced Wolverine in Brazil and made part of a huge chunk of our childhood. EDIT: Thanks for the upvotes everyone! Remember, to eat healthy! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.dc:creator: exploradoresciclos2018

item.title: 6 months progress
item.description: Posting this as a reminder to myself of how far I've come! After 4 kids, the baby weight needed to come off and I needed ME back. Here's to 6 months of increased energy, improved mental health, and more muscle than I've ever had in my life! The scale technically reads the same but I know that the fat I've lost has been replaced with muscle and I'm healthier now than I've been since I was a child! Can't wait to see how much progress I make in another 6 months! MV edit: thank you all so much for the support! This community is awesome.
item.dc:creator: giraffytaffy
